name: Beans Rice Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 3 slices of tender red cabbage, diced and sautéed in balsamic vinegar (or apple juice and lemon juice)
1/2 cup diced figs (4 fresh figs), or favorite fruit (such as apple or cranberry)
1/2 large Vidalia onion, diced and sautéed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash half of the white beans and reserve the other half whole.
2. Mix mashed beans with cooked rice and reserved whole beans.
3. Add diced red cabbage, figs, and onion to the mixture. If needed, process in a food processor until fully diced.
4. Stir in cinnamon.
5. Serve 4 portions.
